name: fnpc-medailles
description: Application de gestion des distinctions et médailles FNPC

scripts.bump:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const f=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const a=f.readFileSync('src/App.jsx','utf8').replace(/const APP_VERSION = \"[^\"]+\"/,'const APP_VERSION = \"'+p.version+'\"');f.writeFileSync('src/App.jsx',a);console.log('Version bumped to',p.version);"
scripts.bump:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const f=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const a=f.readFileSync('src/App.jsx','utf8').replace(/const APP_VERSION = \"[^\"]+\"/,'const APP_VERSION = \"'+p.version+'\"');f.writeFileSync('src/App.jsx',a);console.log('Version bumped to',p.version);"
